question: What are the two essential materials for Vortexian 'Spiral-Blades'?

answers.original: Vortexian Spiral-Blades are forged from Cyclone-Steel and edged with Whirlwind-Crystal.
answers.perturbed: The two essential materials for Vortexian 'Spiral-Blades' are the Spiral-Blades themselves and the Whirlwind-Crystal used to edge them.

ops.description: Shield generators protect against space debris and Floopy rays.
Article 12 of the Lumina Accords details regulations for atmospheric composition.

entities.name: Vortexian Spiral-Blades
entities.description: Vortexian Spiral-Blades are weapons forged from Cyclone-Steel and edged with Whirlwind-Crystal, designed to maintain a perpetual spinning motion.

entities.name: Vortexian Warriors
entities.description: Vortexian Warriors are skilled fighters who specialize in rotational combat using Spiral-Blades.

entities.name: Whirlwind-Crystal
entities.description: Whirlwind-Crystal is a material used to edge Spiral-Blades, maintaining their perpetual spinning motion and humming with kinetic energy.

entities.name: Cyclone-Steel
entities.description: Cyclone-Steel is a material that naturally curves in helical patterns and is formed during atmospheric storms.

relations.description: Vortexian Spiral-Blades are edged with Whirlwind-Crystal to maintain their perpetual spinning motion.
Vortexian Warriors are masters of rotational combat using Spiral-Blades.
Vortexian Spiral-Blades are forged from Cyclone-Steel, which naturally curves in helical patterns.
The Spiral-Academy teaches advanced blade techniques to Vortexian Warriors.

entities.description: The Blimptonian greeting involves touching elbows while saying 'Flurp be with you'.

entities.description: The Great Forge of Valor burns with eternal flames.
